title: P3 commit-queue enforcement start
body: Secret Vanishing Moth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e1c starting cost-of-collaboration P3 commit-queue enforcement. Active claims and active commit queue summarised empty before edits; no other agents present in active claims. Scope is commit-queue pre-stage enforcement plus focused tests, commit skill wording, and required plan/thread/napkin/state updates. P4 active-agent visibility and the new multi-agent delegation strategic brief stay out of this implementation slice.
